app.title: Discover the world's most unusual holidays

holiday.noHolidaysFound: No holidays found for this date.

error.title: Unable to Load Content
error.fetchFailed: We're experiencing difficulties retrieving holiday information at this time. Please check your connection and try again.
error.connectionError: Unable to establish a connection to the server. Please verify your internet connection and try again.
error.databaseError: An error occurred while accessing the holiday database. Our team has been notified and is working to resolve this issue.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the home page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy – Ferrio App
privacy.s1p1: The data controller is Andrzej Chmiel, publisher of the Ferrio mobile app.
privacy.s2p1: Ferrio processes the user's email address and a unique identifier (UID) when logging in via Firebase Authentication.
privacy.s2p2: The email address is used solely to:
privacy.s2i1: link reports (holiday error reports or missing holiday suggestions) to the user's account,
privacy.s2i2: block an account in case of abuse (e.g., spam).
privacy.s2p3: Anonymous login is also available. In this case, no personal data is collected, but anonymous users cannot use the reporting feature.
privacy.s3p1: Data is processed using Firebase (Google LLC).
privacy.s3p2: User identifiers are additionally stored on the administrator's server (OVH, EU) to associate reports with accounts.
privacy.s4p1: Users can report errors in holiday information or suggest missing holidays.
privacy.s4p2: The reporting feature is available only to authenticated (non-anonymous) users. Anonymous accounts cannot submit reports, as they cannot be identified or blocked in case of abuse.
privacy.s4p3: Report contents may include personal information entered voluntarily by the user. Such data is not required or used for any other purpose.
privacy.s5p2: The legal basis is the legitimate interest of the controller under Article 6(1)(f) of the GDPR.
privacy.s6p1: No data is shared with third parties except for Firebase, which acts as a data processor under Google's terms.
privacy.s7p1: Data is stored as long as the user keeps using the app.
privacy.s7p2: To request deletion of your data, please send an email to <email>{{contactEmail}}</email>.
privacy.s7p3: Anonymous accounts do not store personal data and can be reset by clearing the app data.
privacy.s8i2: request deletion, correction, or restriction of processing,
privacy.s8i4: file a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.s9p1: All data is protected in accordance with current Firebase security standards.
privacy.s10p1: The privacy policy may be updated. The current version will always be available in the app and on ferrio.app.
